summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. All five listed refs are open non-security pull requests with live state from the preflight artifact; no shared canonical is present and the job blocks merge, fix, and raise_pr, so each PR is kept as an independent maintainer-review item rather than closed or merged.

actions.reason: Independent active PR requiring its own author/maintainer review path; no duplicate, supersession, low-signal, or security signal is established.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; no evidence supports closeout as duplicate, superseded, fixed by another candidate, low-signal, or security-sensitive.
Independent active PR with non-security technical review risk; no duplicate/supersession evidence and no allowed merge or fix action.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; no hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, low-signal, or security-sensitive classification.
Independent attribution PR; no evidence supports automated closeout, and low-signal PR closeout is disabled by the fix artifact permissions.
